items.title: [正面] Great game with a very interesting story. Very fre...
items.summary: Great game with a very interesting story. Very free to play friendly, so many free pulls on top of that. It Should get more recognition.

items.title: [正面] Went in for the Saya no Uta collab event, but what...
items.summary: Went in for the Saya no Uta collab event, but what I found was a hidden gem in the gacha space with great roguelike deck building gameplay and lovecraftian horror aesthetics! Also despite being a gacha, the devs are so generous giving almost 350+ free pulls just for this anniversary event alone. Give it a try!
items.review: Went in for the Saya no Uta collab event, but what I found was a hidden gem in the gacha space with great roguelike deck building gameplay and lovecraftian horror aesthetics!
